title: T-025 — Genealogy write on consumption (lp_genealogy INSERT)
prompt:
# T-025 — Genealogy write on consumption

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.2 FR-08-E2-004, §13 R1, §5.3#2 FSMA 204

## Goal
Wire wo_material_consumption to write `lp_genealogy` row (consumed LP → WO) inside the same atomic transaction so genealogy is never broken (R1).

## Implementation contract
Extend consume-to-wo service: after INSERT into wo_material_consumption, INSERT into lp_genealogy (defined in 05-WH §11) with operation_type='consume', source_lp_id=lp_id, target_wo_id=wo_id, qty=qty_consumed, created_at=now. The genealogy table is owned by 05-WH; this task only adds the INSERT call. Add an integration test verifying that for every wo_material_consumption row a lp_genealogy row exists with matching transaction_id.

## Files (scope)
- packages/api-services/production/consume-to-wo.ts [modify]
- packages/api-services/integrations/genealogy-adapter.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/__tests__/consumption-genealogy.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given consume-to-wo succeeds, when querying lp_genealogy by source_lp_id, then a row exists with operation_type='consume', target_wo_id matching the WO, and qty matching qty_consumed
2. Given a transaction error during genealogy INSERT, when consume-to-wo runs, then the entire transaction rolls back and no wo_material_consumption row remains
3. Given 100 sequential consumptions, when querying SELECT count(*) FROM lp_genealogy WHERE target_wo_id=:wo_id, then count equals 100 (R1 zero-loss invariant)

## Test strategy
- RED: integration test asserting lp_genealogy row written + rollback on error before genealogy-adapter exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter api-services test consumption-genealogy'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow genealogy INSERT to fail silently (R1 critical)
- Do not write lp_genealogy outside the consumption transaction
- Do not modify lp_genealogy schema (05-WH owns)

pipeline_inputs.description: Inline lp_genealogy INSERT inside consume-to-wo transaction for FSMA 204 + R1.
pipeline_inputs.details: Genealogy adapter inserts row referencing source_lp_id + target_wo_id with operation_type='consume'. Atomic with consumption insert: rollback if either fails. lp_genealogy schema lives in 05-WH; this task uses the existing adapter contract.
out_of_scope: Do not implement output genealogy (T-031 wires output side)
Do not implement genealogy query API
acceptance_criteria: Given consume-to-wo succeeds, when SELECT lp_genealogy WHERE source_lp_id=:lp, then row with operation_type='consume', target_wo_id matching, qty matching qty_consumed
Given transaction error in genealogy INSERT, when service runs, then full rollback (no consumption row persists)
Given 100 sequential consumptions, when count lp_genealogy WHERE target_wo_id=:wo, then count=100
test_strategy: RED: integration test asserting genealogy row + rollback before adapter exists
risk_red_lines: Do not allow silent genealogy failure
Do not write outside consumption transaction
